description.text: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.

es.original: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.
es.translation:
Islas aisladas que forman una defensa formidable.
Un núcleo.

fr.original: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.
fr.translation: Les îles isolées constituent une défense formidable. Tenez bon et ne lâchez pas un pouce de terrain ! Une base.

de.original: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.
de.translation: Einsame Inseln bilden eine ausgezeichnete Verteidigung in diesem Niemandsland. Bleibt stark und kontert hart! Eine Basis.

ru.original: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.
ru.translation: Чем неприступнее острова, тем проще обороняться. Жестко встреть врага, а затем смело иди в контратаку. Одна база.

pt.original: Isolated islands form a formidable defence. Hold strong and counter hard across no-man's land. One Base.
pt.translation: Ilhas isoladas formam uma defesa formidável. Defenda-se e parta para o contra-ataque nesta terra de ninguém. Uma Base.
